class.name: SpineSliderPose
class.brief_description: Stores a pose for a slider.
class.description: Stores the current pose values for a slider constraint, including the time position and mix value.

method.name: get_time
method.description: Returns the time position for this slider.

method.name: set_time
method.description: Sets the time position for this slider.

method.name: get_mix
method.description: Returns the mix value for this slider.

method.name: set_mix
method.description: Sets the mix value for this slider.
